title: Manifest And ObjectBatch Contracts
steps: Define PluginManifest with identity, sdk_version, revdeck_compat, capabilities, permissions, inputs, outputs, config, UI contribution metadata, and provenance settings.
Define CapabilityKind and PermissionSet with default-deny semantics.
Define ObjectBatch, ObjectFact, EdgeFact, TypedAttribute, DiagnosticFact, and DryRunReport using ObjectRef/ObjectKind/EdgeKind from revdeck-core.
Implement manifest parse/validate from TOML, including semver compatibility parsing and structured validation errors/warnings.
Implement ObjectBatch dry-run validation for unknown/dangling refs, missing provenance, duplicate object refs, and deterministic normalized summaries.
convergence_criteria: Valid manifest fixture parses and validates.
Invalid manifest fixtures return structured validation reports.
ObjectBatch dry-run can validate a simple object+edge graph without DB mutation.

result.summary: Manifest, permissions, ObjectBatch, and validation contracts implemented with structured diagnostics and deterministic summaries.
result.tests_passed: cargo test -p revdeck-plugin-sdk passed; cargo test --workspace passed
